comments.author: github-actions
comments.body: **Dignified Code Simplifier Review**: Default parameter value - Violates 'no default parameters' rule. Use keyword-only args without defaults: consider removing the `= None` default and letting callers pass values explicitly, or use a factory method pattern.

comments.author: github-actions
comments.body: **Dignified Code Simplifier Review**: EAFP exception handling (try/except for control flow) - Violates LBYL principle. Instead of catching `TimeoutExpired` and `OSError`, check preconditions first or validate gracefully without relying on exceptions for control flow.

comments.author: github-actions
comments.body: **Dignified Python**: Silent exception swallowing - Violates exception handling rules. Even with graceful degradation, exceptions must be logged/warned so issues can be diagnosed. Use: `logging.warning(...)` before returning None.
